question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 70.00% on 2026-03-14 for the Metaculus question "Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?"?
summary: This is a meta-prediction about whether the Metaculus CP for "Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?" will exceed 70% on March 14, 2026. The CP surged from ~32% to 80% following unprecedented US-Israeli strikes that killed Khamenei on Feb 28. The CP is currently 10 points above the threshold. Military operations are ongoing with no ceasefire, and Trump has projected operations lasting ~1 month. The regime has shown institutional resilience (forming an Interim Leadership Council), but the ongoing conflict and permanent removal of Khamenei structurally support elevated CP. The main risk is CP drift downward if regime resilience becomes more apparent, but a 10+ point drop in 12 days seems unlikely given the active conflict.

factors.description: CP currently at 80%, 10 points above the 70% threshold — requires significant downward movement to resolve NO
Khamenei's assassination is permanent and irreversible, structurally supporting elevated CP regardless of other developments
US military operations ongoing with stated regime change objective; Trump projected ~1 month timeline, meaning operations will be active on March 14
Iran rejected ceasefire proposal — no near-term de-escalation path visible
Regime showing institutional resilience: Interim Leadership Council formed, Guardian Council active, Assembly of Experts beginning succession — could pull CP back down toward 50-60%
CP showed significant volatility between 70-80% on March 1, briefly touching 70% — threshold proximity creates risk of crossing below
Underlying question criteria not yet met (Pezeshkian and Guardian Council retain authority, constitution unchanged) — caps how high CP can sustainably go

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.73 (73% probability YES)**

The CP for the Iranian government question is currently at 80%, well above the 70% threshold, and I estimate a 73% chance it remains above 70% on March 14.

**Key reasoning:**
- The 10-point buffer above threshold provides significant protection
- Ongoing US-Israeli military operations (with ~1 month projected timeline) will sustain pressure through the resolution date
- Khamenei's assassination permanently elevated the probability floor
- However, the regime has shown institutional resilience (Interim Council functioning, IRGC operational), and the CP showed volatility near 70% on March 1, creating meaningful downside risk
- The underlying question's resolution criteria have NOT been met (Pezeshkian + Guardian Council still hold authority), which caps how high CP can sustainably go
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38770)
